category_sources: Official docs https://lunarmodules.github.io/busted/ describe busted as elegant Lua unit testing.
source_facts.description says Elegant Lua unit testing.
display_name_sources: Official docs heading at https://lunarmodules.github.io/busted/ is busted.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site with usage, defining tests, asserts, spies, stubs, mocks, matchers, and async tests.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lunarmodules/busted, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs https://lunarmodules.github.io/busted/ include sections for usage, defining tests, asserts, spies, stubs, mocks, matchers, and async tests.
